title: DingDuff cite-check verification output (cites.json), schema v1
description: Machine-verified citation anchors for a legal memo. All offsets are Unicode codepoint indices (Python str indices) into the referenced file's content decoded from UTF-8 bytes with no newline translation. Every anchors[].quote equals the raw slice raw[start:end] of its source file, making the file self-validating.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the memo file's raw bytes. Consumers must refuse to render highlights when this no longer matches.

sources.description: Deduplicated map of cited source documents. Keys: 'cl-{cluster_id}' for opinions, 'stat-{filename stem}' for statutes.

path.description: Project-root-relative path to the stored markdown file. Null only when missing=true.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the source file's raw bytes. Null only when missing=true.

missing.description: True when the cited authority had no stored file and the user declined to fetch it; its citations carry status=anchor_failed, failure_reason=source_missing.

cluster_id.description: CourtListener cluster id (opinions). Used by viewers to re-fetch the document.

statute_id.description: DingDuff statute identifier '[jurisdiction]/[code]/[section]', e.g. 'US/18-usc/1001'. Used by viewers to re-fetch the document.

citations.description: One entry per citation INSTANCE in the memo (the same case cited five times yields five entries).

cite_text.description: The citation exactly as it appears in the memo (including Id./supra short forms).

pin.description: Pin cite page, if present. Not machine-verified in v1; the wrong_pin review verdict exists for this.

memo_anchor.description: Codepoint span of cite_text within the memo. Null when anchoring failed.

proposition.description: The claim this citation is offered to support — what the attorney verifies.

anchors.description: Verified supporting passages in the source file. An ellipsis quote yields one anchor per segment.

quote.description: The raw slice source_raw[start:end] — exactly what a viewer should highlight or re-locate.

binds_to.description: SHA-256 of cite_text + "\u0000" + proposition. review.json verdicts bind to this value; a mismatch marks the verdict stale.
